weather.headline: Red Flag Warning issued June 20 at 12:30AM MDT until June 20 at 10:00PM MDT by NWS Pueblo CO
weather.areaDesc: Upper Arkansas River Valley Including Lake County and Chaffee County; Fremont County Including Canon City/Howard/Texas Creek; Eastern San Juan Mountains and La Garita Mountains Including Wolf Creek Pass and Creede; San Luis Valley Including Alamosa/Del Norte/Fort Garland/Saguache
